name: ddd-clean-arch-kit
description: DDD + Clean Architecture toolkit for .NET. Skills for system design (event storming, bounded contexts, aggregate modeling), the ADR / living-design-doc / SDLC discipline that produced 52 consistent decisions, and a dotnet new template with an end-to-end aggregate slice generator.

plugins.name: ddd-clean-arch
plugins.description: Skills extracted from the Forkfully reference solution: DDD system design, the ADR/design-doc/SDLC method, and a .NET Clean Architecture scaffold with an aggregate slice generator.
